ruleId.description: The ID of the rule that was evaluated

matched.description: Whether the condition evaluated to true

executionTimeMs.description: Time taken to evaluate the rule in milliseconds

actionTaken.description: The action triggered (from onSuccess or onFailure)

inputs.description: The variables and their values provided to the CEL environment during evaluation

evaluatedExpressions.description: A map of sub-expressions or variables to their resolved values
